_comment: Example schema for experiments/workstreams.json. Copy to workstreams.json and fill in real workspace data. The harnesses load this file at runtime; the real workstreams.json is gitignored to keep workspace-specific data out of the repo.

example-workspace-a._slack_dir_comment: Directory name under ~/.local/share/pigeon/slack/ for this workspace.

merges._comment: Optional. Maps old workstream IDs to a surviving ID after a discover round identified semantic duplicates. Applied to labels at evaluator load time so existing labels don't need re-labelling.

workstreams.name: Feature X Development
workstreams.focus: Natural-language description of what this workstream is about. Typically taken from `pigeon workstream discover`'s output. Should describe the work, the artifacts (PRs, channels, partners), and the current state. The filter embeds this prose; embedding similarity to incoming messages is the routing signal.

workstreams.name: Incident Y Investigation
workstreams.focus: Another workstream's focus. Keep these distinct from each other — pairs whose focus prose embeds at cosine > ~0.7 cannot be reliably distinguished by the embedding-only filter and produce double-routing.
